sglang.title: Rename InputMetadata -> ForwardBatch
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Since now InputMetadata stores not only the metadata, but also all required inputs of a forward pass. This PR renames InputMetadata to ForwardBatch. This is also more consistent with ScheduleBatch.
Rename SchedulerPolicy -> SchedulePolicy

sglang.title: Clean up batch data structures: Introducing ModelWorkerBatch
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The following is the flow of data structures for a batch:
ScheduleBatch -> ModelWorkerBatch -> ForwardBatch

ScheduleBatch is managed by scheduler.py::Scheduler.
It contains high-level scheduling data. Most of the data is on the CPU.
ModelWorkerBatch is managed by tp_worker.py::TpModelWorker.
Forwar

sglang.bodyExcerpt: Updates linear layers in lora.py to SRT's linear layers to align with the changes on main.

vllm.title: [Core] Make scheduling policy settable via EngineArgs
vllm.author: schoennenbeck
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR makes the policy for the scheduler settable via the EngineArgs.
So far the new priority-policy could only be activated in an LLMEngine by altering the scheduler after creation. This makes the policy accessible at the time of engine creation.
BEFORE SUBMITTING, PLEASE READ THE CHECKLIST BELOW

vllm.title: [Misc] add process_weights_after_loading for DummyLoader
vllm.author: divakar-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Similar to DefaultModelLoader.load_model, this PR adds adds process_weights_after_loading to DummyModelLoader.
Hence, extending --load_format=dummy capability to more (quantized) models. This is helpful for faster debugging (& profiling) of models as it skips actual weight loading from the disk.
